metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Test infrastructure — conftest.py lives in tests/ by pytest convention, not the 3-layer app structure. Test support files are exempt.

Test infrastructure — imports aipass.prax.apps.handlers.logging.direct to redirect log output during tests. Necessary to clear cached logger state; no module entry point exists for this internal reset.

Test infrastructure — sys.path manipulation is intentional: adds src/ root for aipass.* imports and skill root for local apps.handlers.* imports. Required because tests run without a full pip install of the skill.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention, not in the 3-layer app structure. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler module directly for unit testing. Tests need direct access to monkeypatch module-level attributes and verify handler behavior.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler directly for unit testing. Tests need direct access to patch module-level state and verify handler internals.
Test file — public functions are pytest test methods; docstrings on individual test methods are optional when class docstring and test name are self-documenting.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler directly for unit testing. Tests need direct access to patch module-level state.
Test file — pytest test methods are self-documenting via class/method names; docstrings on individual test cases are optional.
Test data — /home/aipass/* paths are mock return values passed to validate_branch() and create_bot() mocks, not real filesystem paths. They represent synthetic registry entries in test fixtures.
Test-only teardown — base_bot.pending_file.unlink() simulates file absence to verify heartbeat backward-compat behavior. No trigger event is appropriate for test fixture manipulation.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler directly for unit testing.
Test file — pytest test methods are self-documenting via class/method names.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler directly for unit testing.

Test file — pytest test methods are self-documenting via class/method names.
Test file — lives in tests/ by convention. Test files are exempt from layer architecture standard.
Test file — imports handler directly for unit testing.
Test data — /home/test/api is a mock return value for validate_branch(), not a real filesystem path.
Test file — asserts that launch_mirror_session() correctly passes --dangerously-skip-permissions. Testing the TDPLAN-0009 feature, not bypassing permissions.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — bot_factory imports _api_set_secret from aipass.api.apps.modules.secrets for config persistence. Same pattern as config.py.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — factory functions predate json_handler.log_operation convention. Adding log_operation to every function is a separate cleanup task.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — file uses legacy header format from Dev-Pass port, not the META block format.

TDPLAN-0009 — launch_mirror_session() intentionally uses --dangerously-skip-permissions. Detached tmux mirror sessions have no operator to approve prompts; without it the session hangs forever. Patrick's explicit ask.
Same-branch handler utility import — parse_frontmatter is a shared parsing function needed by both discovery and loader handlers
Same-branch handler utility import — template.py provides copy/get functions used only by creator_handler
Conditional import holder — yaml is assigned via 'import yaml' on success or stays None. Not a constant, just a module reference variable
Public API functions — used by test_registry.py and available for external callers; part of the registry module's contract

DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — ported-but-unwired from the 9k-line Dev-Pass telegram port. chunk_text (long-message splitting) and on_response (response hook) await wiring; on_response is a pending Wave-2 design call. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — multi-bot listing helper, ported-but-unwired pending multi-bot wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — used by the response router to match CWD→bot; awaits the response_router wiring (td-38 import-vs-delete). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — branch-plugin response hook, ported-but-unwired; pending Wave-2 on_response design call (td-38). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — config accessors/validator ported-but-unwired, pending wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — file up/download feature ported-but-unwired, pending wiring. See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — response-router helpers, pending the response_router import-vs-delete design call (td-38). See README → Ported-but-unwired.
DPLAN-0220 incomplete port — interactive tmux session management, ported-but-unwired pending wiring (td-38 tmux). See README → Ported-but-unwired.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
